title: getadminsubscriptionswithadmincredentials
description: Verify that GET /admin/subscriptions with valid admin credentials returns 200 OK and a list of all subscriptions.

title: postapisubscriptionsupgradewithvalidpayload
description: Verify that POST /api/subscriptions/upgrade with valid admin credentials and a valid target user payload upgrades the user's subscription plan and returns 200 or 201 status.

title: getadminuserswithadmincredentials
description: Verify that GET /admin/users with valid admin credentials returns 200 OK and a list of all platform users.

title: getadminarticleswithadmincredentials
description: Verify that GET /admin/articles with valid admin credentials returns 200 OK and a list of all articles.

title: postapiarticleswithvalidadminpayload
description: Verify that POST /api/articles with valid admin credentials and valid article content creates a new article and returns 201 Created.

title: getblogslugwithvalidslug
description: Verify that GET /blog/[slug] with a valid published slug returns 200 OK and the article content for public access.
